page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.24xlarge is a memory-optimized instance type powered by the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. The server features 96 dedicated physical cores utilizing AMD EPYC 9T24 processors running at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. With a 1:1 ratio of vCPUs to physical cores, the instance provides dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading, ensuring consistent performance for demanding workloads.

The instance is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core. This high memory density makes the server suitable for memory-intensive applications. It does not include local NVMe storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Given its hardware profile, the ecs.r8a.24xlarge is designed for large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and memory-heavy data processing tasks. The dedicated AMD EPYC core allocation provides predictable execution times, which is highly beneficial for production databases and real-time analytics.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.24xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance designed for resource-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by the KVM hypervisor, it features 96 dedicated physical cores on an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz with an x86_64 architecture. The instance provides 768.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core memory-to-CPU ratio. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage options. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This hardware configuration is optimized for memory-heavy applications, including large-scale databases, in-memory data stores, and complex data processing pipelines that require predictable, dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.24xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 96 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores, 768 GB of RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth for demanding database and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring ninety-six dedicated AMD EPYC cores and seven hundred sixty-eight gigabytes of RAM for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 physical cores with no hyperthreading.
768.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for reliable data transfer.
Zero local storage and no integrated GPU accelerators.
Optimized for large-scale databases and in-memory caching.
